mapper.select: SELECT * FROM check_in_record ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM check_in_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO check_in_record (booking_id, room_id, check_in_time, status) VALUES (#{bookingId}, #{roomId}, #{checkInTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE check_in_record SET room_id=#{roomId}, check_in_time=#{checkInTime}, check_out_time=#{checkOutTime}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
